description: Weight & Balance Calculator — calculates weight and balance for each mission against aircraft-specific envelopes with support for passenger, cargo, and medevac configurations

hard_stops.label: Weight Exceeds MTOW
hard_stops.logic: Computed takeoff weight exceeds the aircraft's maximum takeoff weight — cannot dispatch

hard_stops.label: CG Out of Envelope
hard_stops.logic: Computed center of gravity is outside the aircraft's forward or aft CG limits — cannot dispatch

hard_stops.label: Zero Fuel Weight Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Computed zero fuel weight exceeds the aircraft's maximum zero fuel weight limit

soft_flags.label: Weight Within 5% of MTOW
soft_flags.logic: Computed takeoff weight is within 5% of MTOW — performance may be limited, verify runway and climb performance

soft_flags.label: CG Approaching Limit
soft_flags.logic: Computed CG is within 5% of the forward or aft limit — small loading changes could push CG out of envelope

soft_flags.label: High Density Altitude Performance Advisory
soft_flags.logic: Density altitude at departure or destination exceeds 5,000 feet — performance adjustments required
